allow: Bash(node -e "const h = require\('@hugeicons/react'\); const keys = Object.keys\(h\).filter\(k => /bread|croissant|coffee|cup|family|user.*group|heart|home|clock|phone|mail|map|calendar|star|cake|wheat/i.test\(k\)\); console.log\(keys.slice\(0,40\).join\('\\n'\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const h = require\('@hugeicons/core-free-icons'\); const keys = Object.keys\(h\).filter\(k => /bread|croissant|coffee|cup|family|user|heart|home|clock|phone|mail|map|calendar|cake|wheat|bakery/i.test\(k\)\); console.log\(keys.slice\(0,30\).join\('\\n'\)\)")
